import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../../contexts/AuthContext'; import './Header.css'; const Header = () => { const { user, logout } = useAuth(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const [showHowItWorks, setShowHowItWorks] = useState(false); const handleLogout = () => { logout(); navigate('/login'); }; const toggleHowItWorks = () => { setShowHowItWorks(!showHowItWorks); }; return ( <>
🧠 MindMatch
{user ? ( <> Dashboard Career Quiz Profile Progress {/* How It Works Dropdown */}
{showHowItWorks && (

🚀 How MindMatch Works

1

Take Career Assessment

Complete our comprehensive quiz to discover your strengths, interests, and ideal career paths

2

Build Your Profile

Add your skills, education, experience, and career interests for personalized recommendations

3

Get Matched with Mentors

Connect with experienced professionals in your desired field who can guide your career journey

4

Track Your Progress

Monitor your career development with our progress tracking system and get actionable insights

5

Grow Your Career

Access learning resources, build connections, and advance in your chosen career path

✨ Key Features

🎯 Personalized Career Matching
👥 Expert Mentor Network
📊 Progress Tracking
💼 Career Resources

🚀 Quick Start Guide

  1. Complete the Career Quiz to get your assessment
  2. Fill out your Profile with skills and interests
  3. Browse and connect with Mentors in your field
  4. Track your Progress and set career goals
  5. Explore Courses and learning resources
)}
Hello, {user.name} ) : ( <> Login Sign Up )}
{/* Overlay for closing dropdown when clicking outside */} {showHowItWorks && (
)} ); }; export default Header;
